content:
# Session 18 ‚Äî Recommendations for next plan iter

## TOP PRIORITY ‚Äî close the single remaining D3‚Ä≤ leaf brick
**`pullbackValIso_comp_leg`** (`TensorObjSubstrate.lean` L~3176; blueprint `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`).
This is now the ONLY open obligation in the whole D3‚Ä≤ cone (`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` is otherwise
sorry-free). It is a bounded ~50-line coherence chase, NOT an instance-boundary wall.
- Recipe (documented in-proof + docstring): after the `pullbackValIso`-unfold + atomic `forget.map`
  split (already spliced), reassemble (a) the `sheafCompPb‚Åª¬π` parts via the **proven** Sq1 coherence
  `sheafificationCompPullback_comp` taking inverses; (b) the counit parts via counit pseudofunctoriality
  (naturality) across `pullbackComp h f`. Splice by `erw` (the `Sheaf.val Z` carrier mismatch).
- **DO NOT blind-erw** this (pre-rejected churn pattern). If a focused `prove` pass stalls, **escalate to
  `effort-breaker`** splitting it into two sub-lemmas: (i) the Sq1-inverse reassembly, (ii) the
  counit-pseudofunctoriality reassembly ‚Äî then prove each small.
- Mode `prove`. The post-split goal is verbatim in the proof body; the build is ~1m40s (LSP not needed).

## MUST-FIX (blueprint, planner-owned) ‚Äî dangling core node
`lem:pullback_tensor_basechange_presheaf_core` pinned a decl `pullbackTensorMap_restrict_core` that **does
not exist** (prover's standalone extraction hit a `MonoidalCategoryStruct` carrier-instance blocker ‚Äî the
core can't be a top-level signature without in-signature `letI` bridges ‚Äî and was reverted). Review already
**removed the dangling `\lean{}` pin** and left a NOTE. Planner must now either:
- (a) repoint to a thin mathematician-written wrapper that carries the carrier instances in a
  `variable [MonoidalCategoryStruct ‚Ä¶]` block; OR
- (b) **drop the node** entirely and fold its `\uses` (currently referenced at the lemma+proof `\uses` of
  `lem:pullback_tensor_map_basechange`, L3216/L3254) directly into `lem:pullback_tensor_map_basechange`.
Recommendation: (b) is cleaner ‚Äî the merged-core content is realized in-place and the node now has no
distinct Lean target. **Do NOT re-assign the standalone extraction to a prover** (it is structurally
impossible at top level).

## MAJOR (blueprint prose realignment, planner-owned)
`lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`'s statement prose describes a Scheme.Modules-level iso equality, but the
landed Lean decl `pullbackValIso_comp_leg` is the **presheaf-level per-leg identity** actually consumed by
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict`. Review pinned the `\lean{}` + added a SCOPE `% NOTE:`. Planner: dispatch a
blueprint-writer to realign the statement prose to the per-leg presheaf form (then it can re-clear the
gate before the next prover pass on the brick).

## 1-to-1 coverage debt (dag unmatched = 101)
- `pullbackValIso_comp_leg` ‚Äî public math brick; **now pinned** by this review to `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`
  ‚Üí re-matches on next dag walk (no further action).
- `map_comp4_eq_comp5`, `tensorHom_collapse_3_4` (L3081/3097) ‚Äî **`private`** generic category/monoidal
  plumbing (no math content, like `comp_cancel_mid`). Per project doctrine "when there is Lean there must be
  tex," consider a one-line `lean_aux` blueprint stub each; or accept as exempt plumbing (consistent with
  the standing treatment of `comp_cancel_mid`, still unmatched).
- `comp_cancel_mid` ‚Äî standing unmatched since iter-015 (same plumbing class).

## Blocked ‚Äî DO NOT re-assign
- `exists_tensorObj_inverse` (L723) ‚Äî import-cycle gated; closes only via the dual chain in
  `DualInverse.lean`. Never finish it in `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` (standing ARCHON_MEMORY rule).

## Reusable proof patterns discovered (added to Knowledge Base)
- **Generic-lemma + `refine`/`exact` is the universal instance-boundary crossing device (now a 3-member
  family: `comp_cancel_mid`, `map_comp4_eq_comp5`, `tensorHom_collapse_3_4`).** State the
  fold/cancel/collapse as a generic single-`[Category C]`/`[MonoidalCategory C]` lemma whose algebra runs
  on clean abstract vars; apply to the concrete folded goal by `refine`/`exact` (assignment-only
  unification). Crosses the `SheafOfModules`-vs-`Scheme.Modules` and non-canonical-`MonoidalCategoryStruct`
  walls on which `simp`/`rw [‚Üê Functor.map_comp]`/`rw [tensorHom_comp_tensorHom]` make no progress and
  `erw` whnf-bombs.
- **Œ¥-naturality must be concrete, never metavar.** `erw [reassoc_of% Œ¥_natural ‚Ä¶]` with metavars
  whnf-times-out (3.2M heartbeats). Build `have hŒ¥nat := Œ¥_natural F u v` with the OplaxMonoidal instance
  pinned once via `show ‚Ä¶ from`, then splice by `erw [‚Üê reassoc_of% hŒ¥nat]`.
- **Carrier-instance trap:** content living in the `PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf.obj` carrier cannot
  be lifted to a top-level lemma ‚Äî its monoidal instances are only synthesizable in the `‚Ä¶ ‚ãô forget‚ÇÇ`
  spelling. Keep such reductions in-place (in-proof `letI` bridges) rather than extracting.
